sources.label: uc913 analyst note (May 2026): record revenue, target raised to 650, data-center mix rising
Wantgoo monthly revenue table (no May print indexed yet)

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's case already recommended removal for weak direct CPO relevance and exhausted asymmetry after a +184.6% YTD rerating; nothing material has emerged since June 6 and today's +0.76% is drift, so no second penalty is warranted at an already-bottom rank.
verdicts.bull: Q1 beat and May analyst target hikes show data-center power management becoming a real growth leg (mgmt sees DC at ~20% of revenue by 2027), which could eventually give it a legitimate AI-power angle.
verdicts.neutral: A well-run analog/power-IC franchise re-rated hard in 1H26; on a CPO-specific alpha list it is a category mismatch trading at post-rerating multiples, with the May revenue print (due ~June 10) the next datapoint.
verdicts.bear: No CPO/optics content, consumer/industrial cycle exposure, and a +184.6% YTD run leave negative residual alpha; any data-center hype cooling or soft monthly revenue triggers sharp mean reversion.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: May 2026 monthly revenue release (~June 10) and evidence of data-center power design wins scaling.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowded post-rerating positioning unwinding on a consumer/industrial demand wobble, with no CPO thesis to fall back on.
